ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or region where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data metric */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "inpatient_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Estimated number of inpatient beds occupied by COVID-19 patients */,
  "inpatient_beds_occupied_ll" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for inpatient beds occupied */,
  "inpatient_beds_occupied_ul" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for inpatient beds occupied */,
  "percentage_inpatient_beds_occupied" REAL /* Estimated percentage of inpatient beds occupied by COVID-19 patients */,
  "percentage_inpatient_beds_occupied_ll" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for percentage of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "percentage_inpatient_beds_occupied_ul" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for percentage of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "total_inpatient_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of inpatient beds */,
  "total_inpatient_beds_ll" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for total inpatient beds */,
  "total_inpatient_beds_ul" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for total inpatient beds */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "data_reliability_score" REAL /* Quantitative measure of data reliability */,
  "data_source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES data_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or region */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state or region */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state or region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or region */,
  "health_authority_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the health authority */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the state */,
  "total_hospitals" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitals in the state */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, research) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "data_source_license" TEXT /* License information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the quality metric is associated with */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the data entry */,
  "missing_data_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of missing data in the data entry */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data entry (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data quality */,
  "data_accuracy_score" REAL /* Quantitative measure of data accuracy */,
  "data_completeness_score" REAL /* Quantitative measure of data completeness */,
  "data_timeliness_score" REAL /* Quantitative measure of data timeliness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES hospitalization_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the change is associated with */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES hospitalization_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's department */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES hospitalization_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of data category (e.g., inpatient, outpatient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., count, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_metrics" (
  "source_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source-metric entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., beds, patients) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES data_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories_metrics" (
  "category_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category-metric entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., beds, patients) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_categories_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_categories_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES data_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "quality_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality-metric entry */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data quality entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., beds, patients) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES data_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history_metrics" (
  "history_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history-metric entry */,
  "history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data history entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., beds, patients) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_metrics_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("history_id") REFERENCES data_history ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES data_metrics ("metric_id")
)
